code: import React from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const StatusCards=_ref=>{let{chargers}=_ref;const online=chargers.filter(c=>c.status==='online'||c.status==='charging').length;const charging=chargers.filter(c=>c.status==='charging').length;const faults=chargers.filter(c=>c.status==='fault').length;const avgTemp=chargers.length>0?chargers.reduce((sum,c)=>sum+c.temperature,0)/chargers.length:0;const stats=[{label:'Total Chargers',value:chargers.length,tone:'neutral'},{label:'Online',value:online,tone:'good'},{label:'Charging',value:charging,tone:'accent'},{label:'Fault Alerts',value:faults,tone:'warn'},{label:'Avg Temperature',value:`${avgTemp.toFixed(1)} C`,tone:'neutral'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{"aria-label":"Summary statistics",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Summary Statistics"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"data-cards",children:stats.map(stat=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("article",{className:`status-card status-card--${stat.tone}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:stat.label}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:stat.value})]},stat.label))})]});};export default StatusCards;
